request.intent:
Insert this card into a new note that explains about Green's Theorem. Make sure that the card's embeddings enclose exactly 3 lines of content within this note.

Also, you should also insert this card into another note that is most related to the card's content.

Lastly, please also merge programming and web's content together. And delete the .crashweaver/cards directory.

oh and also, insert this card also in 3 other notes in the vault.

All necessary context has been gathered. The plan includes creating a new note for Green's Theorem, inserting the card into four existing notes (one most related and three others), merging the programming and web directories via a directory move and rename, and deleting the .crashweaver/cards directory, all within 10 operations.

Deleting .crashweaver/cards may affect card management if any cards are stored there. Proceed with caution.
